info.title: The Protocol
info.lead: Designed for those who make no compromises. «The Protocol» ensures that your daily protective ritual never pauses – the most efficient way to supply your body with over 190 bioactive compounds and all four Omega fatty acids.
info.advantageBody: Whether for the home-office team, the whole family or as a long-term routine – this package offers the outstanding AmberNord value. Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system — your foundation for 60 days.

info.scienceItem2: The absolute most efficient investment in your cellular health.
info.scienceItem3: Yields over 16 litres of vitalising premium drink.
info.scienceItem4: Free premium shipping directly from our logistics centre in Aarau.
